# Arc + drive-line wedges with both offset flags on. The wedge
# faces are interior (their aisle-facing edges come from drive-line
# corridors), so without offset_carriers_interior they routed through
# the weighted skeleton. With it on, each drive-line spawns its own
# offset spine and stalls align with their source aisle.

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
arc -1.0
200,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

drive-line partitions
-50,50
350,50
----
drive-line: -50,50 -> 350,50 partitions

drive-line partitions
-50,150
350,150
----
drive-line: -50,150 -> 350,150 partitions

set stall-angle=90
----
set stall_angle_deg=90

debug offset_carriers=true
----
debug offset_carriers=true

debug offset_carriers_interior=true
----
debug offset_carriers_interior=true

generate
----
total_stalls: 149

snapshot
----
